title: armeria maritima subsp. littoralis
intro: Armeria maritima subsp. littoralis, also known as sea thrift or littoral sea thrift, is a subspecies of the armeria maritima plant, a perennial flowering plant that is commonly found in coastal areas and is prized for its pink or white flowers. The medicinal properties of Armeria maritima subsp. littoralis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of using this plant include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, support respiratory health, and provide antioxidant properties. Armeria maritima subsp. littoralis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
